user.title: Negative Price Export Guard
user.description: Select the Home Assistant entities used by the optimizer. Tuning values are created as Home Assistant entities and can be adjusted later from the UI.

error.missing_entity: The selected entity does not exist.
error.missing_prices_attribute: The selected OKTE sensor must expose a prices attribute.
error.missing_detailed_forecast_attribute: The selected Solcast forecast sensor must expose a detailedForecast attribute.
error.invalid_energy_unit: The selected sensor must use kWh.
error.invalid_power_unit: The selected sensor must use W.
error.invalid_soc_unit: The selected battery SOC sensor must use %.
error.invalid_export_power_unit: The selected inverter export power number must use W.

abort.already_configured: Negative Price Export Guard is already configured.
